Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.cache

  3. RedisCacheManagerBuilder

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.redis.cache.RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder

Packages that use RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.cache
Package providing a Redis implementation for Spring cache abstraction.

  • Uses of RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder in org.springframework.data.redis.cache

    Methods in org.springframework.data.redis.cache that return RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.allowCreateOnMissingCache(boolean allowRuntimeCacheCreation)
    Configure whether to allow cache creation at runtime.
    static RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.builder()
    Factory method returning a Builder used to construct and configure a RedisCacheManager.
    static RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.builder(RedisCacheWriter cacheWriter)
    Factory method returning a Builder used to construct and configure a RedisCacheManager initialized with the given RedisCacheWriter.
    static RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.builder(RedisConnectionFactory connectionFactory)
    Factory method returning a Builder used to construct and configure a RedisCacheManager initialized with the given RedisConnectionFactory.
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.cacheDefaults(RedisCacheConfiguration defaultCacheConfiguration)
    Define a default RedisCacheConfiguration applied to dynamically created RedisCaches.
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.cacheWriter(RedisCacheWriter cacheWriter)
    Configure a RedisCacheWriter.
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.disableCreateOnMissingCache()
    Disable RedisCache creation at runtime for non-configured, undeclared caches.
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.enableCreateOnMissingCache()
    Enables RedisCache creation at runtime for unconfigured, undeclared caches.
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.enableStatistics()
    Enables cache statistics.
    static RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.fromCacheWriter(RedisCacheWriter cacheWriter)
    Factory method returning a new Builder used to create and configure a RedisCacheManager using the given RedisCacheWriter.
    static RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.fromConnectionFactory(RedisConnectionFactory connectionFactory)
    Factory method returning a new Builder used to create and configure a RedisCacheManager using the given RedisConnectionFactory.
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.initialCacheNames(Set<String> cacheNames)
    Append a Set of cache names to be pre initialized with current RedisCacheConfiguration.
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.transactionAware()
    Enable RedisCaches to synchronize cache put/evict operations with ongoing Spring-managed transactions.
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.withCacheConfiguration(String cacheName, RedisCacheConfiguration cacheConfiguration)
    Registers the given cache name and RedisCacheConfiguration used to create and configure a RedisCache on startup.
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.withInitialCacheConfigurations(Map<String, RedisCacheConfiguration> cacheConfigurations)
    Append a Map of cache name/RedisCacheConfiguration pairs to be pre initialized.
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder
    RedisCacheManager.RedisCacheManagerBuilder.withResetCachesStrategy(ResetStrategy resetStrategy)
    Configure the Cache ResetStrategy to use when resetting the cache.
